message:
test: cross-environment variance breakdown, capture_baseline diagnosis mode validation, and clippy fixes

perf_baseline_variance: Adds CrossEnvVarianceBreakdown struct and
compute_cross_env_variance_breakdown() for decomposing variance into
environment/build/runtime/noise components with signal-to-noise ratio
and configurable alert thresholds. Three new tests validate
environment-dominated spread detection, noise-floor classification
when spread is within intra-env CV, and threshold gate behavior.

qa_docs_policy_validation: Adds test verifying capture_baseline.sh
supports --diagnose-env, --diagnose-output, --variance-alert-pct
flags and the cross_env_variance_diagnosis.v1 schema constant.

perf_budgets: Inlines format arguments in two assert! messages.

fault_injection_persistence: Adds clippy::too_many_lines allow on
fault_inject_multi_phase_append_crash_recover_continue.

security_budgets: Adds clippy allow (minor).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
